value.title: MCP — expensive single query (> 5 GB scanned)
value.description: Fires one alert per MCP-driven Grail query that scans more than 5 GB in the last 15 minutes. The scan volume is the primary MCP cost driver, so a single very large query is a governance red flag (missing filters, too-wide timeframe, or wrong bucket).

input.value:
fetch dt.system.events, from: -15m
| filter event.kind == "QUERY_EXECUTION_EVENT" and contains(client.client_context, "dynatrace-mcp")
| filter isNotNull(query_string)
| summarize scanned_bytes = sum(scanned_bytes), user = takeFirst(user.email), table = takeFirst(table), by:{query_id, query_string}
| fieldsAdd scanned_gb = round(scanned_bytes / 1000000000.0, decimals: 2)
| filter scanned_bytes > 5000000000
